visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/40 shadow-sm backdrop-saturate-150
visual_enhancers.cards: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-sm rounded-2xl hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300
visual_enhancers.dev_card: bg-[#0A1128] border border-blue-900 shadow-2xl rounded-2xl text-blue-100

motion.scroll: Use framer-motion for subtle fade-up and staggered reveals on scroll.
motion.hover: Buttons and cards should have slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow expansion.
motion.interactive: The Widget Demo must have a Framer Motion layout transition to simulate a 'loading AI recommendations' state.
motion.parallax: Apply useScroll and useTransform to hero elements and dashboard preview layers to create depth.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure #0052CC text is used against #FFFFFF or #E0EFFF. #0A1128 for main text.
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion using Framer Motion's useReducedMotion hook.

sections.name: Sticky Navbar
sections.details: Links: 'Funkciók', 'API Dokumentáció', 'Admin Belépés'. CTA: 'Kezdés ingyen' in #0052CC. Transparent background is FORBIDDEN. Must use white/70 with backdrop blur.

sections.name: Hero Section

content.headline: Hibrid termékajánló motor, ami tényleg elad.
content.subheadline: Generatív AI és determinisztikus logika ötvözete. Adjon 'Személyi Stylist' élményt webshopjában egyetlen API hívással.

sections.visuals: Right side: Framer-motion driven staggered floating cards showing 'Product detected', 'AI Matching...', 'Conversion +34%'. No heavy images, pure UI/UX motion.

sections.name: Interactive Pipeline Visualization
sections.content: 4 steps: 1. Adatgyűjtés, 2. AI Elemzés, 3. Személyre szabás, 4. Konverzió. Use connecting animated SVG lines between steps. Step cards scale up on hover.

sections.name: Widget Demo Panel
sections.content: A mock 'Webshop' UI card. User clicks a 'Kérem az AI Stylistot' button. Show a Framer Motion loading skeleton, then reveal 3 product cards with '89% Match' badges. Background should be secondary color (#F8FAFC).

sections.name: Developer / API Section
sections.content: Left: 'Fejlesztőkre szabva' (Made for developers). 'Integrálja percek alatt.' Right: A mock code editor showing 'import { MitVegyek } from @mitvegyek/react;'. Use syntax highlighting colors.

sections.name: Analytics Dashboard Preview
sections.content: A massive, gorgeous UI mockup of an analytics dashboard using Recharts. Show AreaChart for 'MRR' and BarChart for 'Konverziós ráta'. Wrap in glassmorphic window frame. Text above: 'Valós idejű ROI követés'.

sections.name: Partner Admin Preview
sections.layout: Bento Grid (MODE B: High Density Grid)
sections.content: Grid showing 'Ügyfelek' (Clients), 'API Kvóta' (API Quota), 'Bevétel' (Revenue). Strict hierarchy, 1px borders, #0052CC accents. Text: 'Menedzselje ügyfeleit egy helyen'.

sections.name: Footer
sections.content: Include Tech Badges (React, Node, AI). Links, and a final massive CTA: 'Készen áll a növekedésre?' (Ready to grow?).

image_urls.description: 3D render abstract digital visualization depicting neural networks. Use sparingly as a subtle background element with low opacity.
Confident businesswoman. Can be used as an avatar in the widget demo or a quote block.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a completely static frontend. No backend or database connections.
Use 'framer-motion' for all animations. Implement staggered reveals and parallax on the Dashboard preview.

The 'Widget Demo Panel' MUST be interactive: build a stateful React component that simulates an AI search when a button is clicked, using Framer Motion's AnimatePresence for the loading and result states.
Use 'recharts' to build a mock analytics chart in the Analytics Preview section.
Strictly adhere to the Light theme. Deep Blue (#0052CC) is the main accent. Use it for CTAs, active states, and highlighted text.
For the code snippet, construct a styled block (e.g., using a pre/code tag styled like a dark terminal) to contrast heavily against the white background.
All texts MUST be in Hungarian as defined in the sections.
Ensure 'lenis' or similar smooth scrolling is implemented at the root level if possible, or use CSS scroll-behavior: smooth.
Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements.
universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: `transition: all`. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use `sonner` for toasts. Sonner component are located in `/app/frontend/src/components/ui/sonner.js`
